clean_text:
KARNATAKA ROAD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION LIMITED
(A Government of Karnataka Undertaking)
Corporate Office: 2nd Floor, Unity Building, Mission Road, Bengaluru   560 027
NOTICE INVITING e-TENDER
NIT Reference: KRDC/SH-43/PKG-02/2026-27/001
Date of Issue: 10 June 2026
4-LANING OF STATE HIGHWAY-43 (KALABURAGI BIDAR)
Package 02: Ch. 48+200 to Ch. 82+800 (34.6 km)
(Funded under Karnataka State Highways Improvement Project Phase III)
IMPORTANT   MANDATORY JOINT VENTURE REQUIREMENT
BIDS FROM STANDALONE COMPANIES WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED FOR THIS PACKAGE.
All bids MUST be submitted by a Joint Venture (JV) or Consortium comprising
two or more firms. A bid submitted by a single company acting alone shall be
SUMMARILY REJECTED at the time of scrutiny without evaluation of technical
or financial bids.
This requirement is non-negotiable. Requests for waiver will not be considered.
Refer to Section 4.1 (Eligibility   Entity Type) for mandatory JV composition
requirements.
1. INTRODUCTION
Karnataka Road Development Corporation Ltd (KRDC), on behalf of the
Government of Karnataka, invites e-tenders from Joint Ventures of eligible
contractors for the following work:
Work Name     : 4-Laning of SH-43 (Kalaburagi to Bidar), Package 02,
                Ch. 48+200 to Ch. 82+800 (34.6 km), including pavement
                strengthening, widening, drainage, structures, and road furniture
Estimated Cost : Rs. 35,00,00,000/- (Rs. Thirty-Five Crore)
EMD            : Rs. 70,00,000/-
Performance Security : 5% of contract value
Completion Period : 30 months
Defect Liability : 24 months
Note: For KSHIP-III packages with Estimated Cost above Rs. 20 Crore,
only Joint Venture bids are accepted per KRDC Procurement Manual 2023,
Clause 4.7.2.
2. KEY DATES

Publication of NIT              : 10 June 2026
Last date for submission        : 25 July 2026, 15:00 hrs
Opening of Technical Bids       : 28 July 2026, 11:00 hrs
3. SCOPE OF WORK
3.1 Pavement Works
  Existing road: single-lane / intermediate lane bituminous road, carriageway
  3.75 m to 5.5 m, heavily distressed.
  Proposed: 4-lane divided carriageway (2x7.0 m) with 1.5 m paved shoulders.
  Construction sequence:
  (a) Earthwork for widening, including borrow excavation and embankment.
  (b) Granular Sub-Base (GSB), Wet Mix Macadam (WMM) on widened portion.
  (c) Milling of existing pavement (50 mm).
  (d) Bituminous Macadam (BM) 75 mm overlay on existing.
  (e) Dense Bituminous Macadam (DBM) 50 mm on widened portion.
  (f) Bituminous Concrete (BC) 40 mm surface course   full width.
  (g) Central median (RCC kerb, median cover slab, W-beam crash barrier).
3.2 Structures
  Three minor bridges (span 6 m, 6 m, 9 m)   rehabilitation and widening.
  Twelve culverts (RCC box, 900 mm to 1200 mm diameter)   new construction.
  Two box drains (1.2 m   1.2 m) at township crossings.
3.3 Road Furniture
  Signage as per IRC 67:2012, road markings, km posts, delineators,
  crash barriers (W-beam), bus bays (3 locations).
4. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
4.1 Entity Type (Mandatory Prerequisite   evaluated before all other criteria)
  Standalone bids: NOT ELIGIBLE.
  Only Joint Ventures or Consortia will be considered. A JV shall consist
  of two or more firms. The JV Agreement (duly stamped and notarised) must
  be submitted with the Technical Bid.
  JV Composition Requirements:
  (a) One firm must be designated the Lead Partner, holding not less than
      51% equity share in the JV.
  (b) Each partner other than the Lead Partner must hold not less than 26%
      equity share.

  (c) Maximum three partners in any JV.
  (d) The Lead Partner shall be the single point of contact with KRDC and
      shall be responsible for all contractual obligations.
  Ineligible structures:
  - Single company bids (regardless of financial or technical capacity)
  - Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) without minimum 2 JV partners
  - JVs where lead partner holds less than 51%
4.2 Financial Eligibility (applicable to JV as a whole unless specified)
Table 1   Financial Criteria
Sl. | Criterion        | Requirement
 1  | Combined Turnover | Average Annual Turnover of the JV (aggregate of
    |                  | all partners) not less than Rs. 40.00 Crore per
    |                  | year from road / highway / civil works, averaged
    |                  | over the last 3 financial years
 2  | Lead Partner     | Lead Partner's Average Annual Turnover not less
    | Turnover         | than Rs. 20.00 Crore per year from road / highway
    |                  | works, averaged over the last 3 financial years
 3  | Net Worth        | Combined Net Worth of all JV partners not less
    |                  | than Rs. 5.00 Crore as on 31 March 2026
4.3 Technical Eligibility
Table 2   Technical Criteria
Sl. | Criterion        | Requirement
 1  | Experience       | Lead Partner OR the JV collectively must have
    |                  | successfully completed at least 2 similar highway
    |                  | or road widening works, each of value not less
    |                  | than Rs. 8.00 Crore, in the last 7 years
 2  | Certification    | Lead Partner must hold valid ISO 9001:2015
    |                  | certification (current)
 3  | Registration     | Lead Partner must hold valid Karnataka PWD
    |                  | registration   Class I or above
4.4 Documents Required (to be submitted by Lead Partner on behalf of JV)
  (a) Signed and notarised JV Agreement specifying equity shares
  (b) Power of Attorney authorising Lead Partner to act for the JV
  (c) Audited financial statements of each partner (3 years)
  (d) Performance certificates for qualifying similar works
  (e) ISO 9001:2015 certificate (Lead Partner)
  (f) Karnataka PWD registration certificate (Lead Partner)
  (g) GST, PAN, EPF / ESIC of each partner

5. SUBMISSION FORMAT
5.1 Two-Cover System (online via Karnataka e-Procurement portal)
  Cover 1 (Technical):
    - EMD (bank guarantee)
    - JV Agreement and Power of Attorney
    - Eligibility documents (Table 1 and Table 2)
    - Technical details (Form T-1 to T-5)
  Cover 2 (Financial):
    - Item-rate schedule (online)
5.2 Percentage quoted against KRDC Schedule of Rates (Roads) 2025 edition.
6. CONTRACT CONDITIONS
6.1 KRDC Standard Conditions of Contract (SCC 2023) shall apply.
6.2 Joint and Several Liability: all JV partners are jointly and severally
    liable for all contractual obligations throughout the contract duration,
    including the defect liability period.
6.3 Lead Partner cannot withdraw from the JV after bid submission.
6.4 Liquidated Damages: 0.5% per week of delay, maximum 10% of contract value.
6.5 KSHIP-III requirements: EMP, SMP, and Health & Safety plan to be submitted
    within 30 days of commencement.
7. GENERAL NOTES
7.1 KRDC reserves the right to reject any or all tenders.
7.2 This NIT is subject to Karnataka Transparency in Public Procurements
    Act, 1999.
7.3 Disputes shall be referred to arbitration (Arbitration and Conciliation
    Act, 1996) at Bengaluru.
7.4 KRDC may split this package or combine with adjacent packages at its
    discretion, without any obligation to bidders.
8. CONTACT
Senior Manager (Procurement)
Karnataka Road Development Corporation Ltd
2nd Floor, Unity Building, Mission Road, Bengaluru   560 027
Phone: 080-2221-4567

Email: procurement@krdc.kar.nic.in
END OF NIT
NIT Reference: KRDC/SH-43/PKG-02/2026-27/001
